summary.key_theme: Qualcomm 積極轉型至 AI 、機器人與 6G 通訊領域以抵銷手機市場疲軟帶來的成長壓力。

bullish.title: Qualcomm (QCOM), Wayve Partner to Accelerate AI-Driven Autonomous Driving
bullish.reason: 與 Wayve 合作開發 AI 自動駕駛技術，展現公司在車用 AI 領域的技術實力與市場滲透力。

bullish.title: QCOM Chips to Power AI Robotics Capabilities: Will it Boost Prospects?
bullish.reason: 透過 Dragonwing 晶片與 NEURA Robotics 合作，成功將業務觸角延伸至人形機器人市場，有助於 AI 營收多元化。

bullish.title: QUALCOMM, Inc. (QCOM) Partners with Keysight to Advance 5G emerging 6G networks
bullish.reason: 與 Keysight 合作推進 6G 網路技術，鞏固其在未來通訊標準制定與硬體供應的領先地位。

bullish.title: QUALCOMM, Inc. (QCOM) and T-Mobile Expand Strategic Collaboration to Expedite the Industry’s Evolution from 5G Advanced to 6G
bullish.reason: 與 T-Mobile 的策略合作強化了其在電信基礎設施領域的影響力，有利於長期營收穩定。

bullish.title: Qualcomm's Buy Thesis Remains Structurally Sound Despite Handset/Memory Headwinds
bullish.reason: 分析師認為儘管手機市場有逆風，但公司多元化佈局與被低估的股價提供了長期投資價值。

bullish.title: QUALCOMM INC (NASDAQ:QCOM) Presents a Compelling Case for Dividend Investors Seeking Quality and Yield
bullish.reason: 2.62% 的股息殖利率與穩健的財務體質，吸引尋求長期收益的價值型投資人。

bullish.title: Qualcomm's Mobile Computing Is Dying, Long Live "Mobile" Computing
bullish.reason: 強調公司正積極從傳統手機晶片轉向 IoT 與機器人領域，轉型策略獲得市場正面解讀。

bearish.title: Qualcomm Stock Warning: Why Bank of America Is Betting That QCOM Will Underperform
bearish.reason: 美國銀行將評級下調至「表現落後」，主要擔憂智慧型手機市場需求疲軟及記憶體供應鏈風險。

bearish.title: What's Going On With Qualcomm Stock On Tuesday?
bearish.reason: 受美國晶片出口限制新規與記憶體供應鏈擔憂影響，導致股價盤前下跌 2.73%。

bearish.title: Here's Why Qualcomm (QCOM) Fell More Than Broader Market
bearish.reason: 股價單日下跌 2.21%，表現遜於大盤，反映市場對其短期成長動能的疑慮。

bearish.title: What Wall Street Is Saying About Semiconductor Names Qualcomm (QCOM), Nvidia (NVDA) and SolarEdge (SEDG) Today
bearish.reason: 華爾街對半導體板塊進行重新評估，對 Qualcomm 的短期展望持謹慎態度。

neutral.title: Assessing Qualcomm (QCOM) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness And Long Term Return Strength
neutral.reason: 客觀分析近期股價疲軟與長期報酬潛力，未給出明確買賣建議，屬中性評估。
